# TagoBeats

> TagoBeats is the beat catalog and music production studio of Robin Busse, a German audio engineer and music producer based near Leipzig. Robin Busse and TagoBeats are the same person — TagoBeats is his production alias.

## About Robin Busse

Robin Busse is an audio engineer and music producer with 7+ years of experience and a catalog of 300+ tracks, mostly hip-hop, trap and cinematic instrumentals. He holds a Bachelor of Engineering in Audio Engineering (Hochschule Mittweida) and also develops his own VST plugins and audio DSP algorithms, including DubCheck (audio QC software, https://audio-dubcheck.com) and TagoPitch (free vocal pitch shifter plugin, macOS AU/VST3 and Windows VST3, https://tagobeats.com/#tb-plugins).

Services: full music production, mixing, mastering, audio engineering, beat licensing.

Contact: music@tagobeats.com · hello@tagobeats.com

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://tagobeats.com/): Beat catalog selection, plugins, drone photography, about Robin Busse
- [TagoPitch](https://tagobeats.com/#tb-plugins): Free vocal pitch shifter plugin, download against email (source: https://github.com/TagoBeats/TagoPitch)
- [Beat Catalog](https://tagobeats.com/music): Stream, preview and license the full TagoBeats catalog via BeatStars

- Portfolio (DSP development): https://robinbusse.dev/
